name: Yamashin-Filter Corp.
summary: YAMASHIN-FILTER CORP. develops, manufactures, and sells construction machinery, industrial, and process filters in Japan, Asia, North America, and Europe. The company's construction machinery filters include hydraulic fluid, transmission, engine oil, and fuel filters that are used in on-highway/off-highway machinery for hydraulic, lube, transmission, engine, fuel, and other applications. Its industrial filters comprise suction filters, last chance filters, drain filters, nylon strainers, line filters, return filters, air breathers, accessory valves, pilot filters, spin filters, and element cartridges, which are used to filter hydraulic fluids, lubricating oils, and other liquids in a range of industrial machinery, such as machine tools, compressors for cooling equipment, agricultural machinery, railroads and ships, rolling stock, planes, helicopters, and cars. The company's process filters include cartridges, housings, and capsules that are used in processes requiring high levels of filtration, such as high-precision cleaning of electronic parts, and nanoparticle level sorting in capacitor and film production for the electronic parts, precision components, LCD displays, food and beverage, and fine chemical industries. It also provides filters for drive-trains and fuel systems; and industrial filter related parts. The company was formerly known as Yamashin Indystry Inc. and changed its name to YAMASHIN-FILTER CORP. in October 2005. YAMASHIN-FILTER CORP. was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
